# Canva AI thumbnail prompts – Dr. Reddy videos

Use these prompts in **Canva’s AI thumbnail / image generator**. Paste one prompt per thumbnail, then export as **1280×720 PNG** and save as `video-reddy-1.png` … `video-reddy-16.png` in this folder.

---

## Wellnest brand colors (match the /wellnest UI)

The app uses a **mint/sage/teal** palette. Use these so thumbnails feel part of the same experience:

| Use for | Color | Hex |
|--------|--------|-----|
| **Key-word banners, primary accent** | Mint / sage green | `#63D4AC` |
| **Darker accent, contrast** | Darker teal | `#4ab896` |
| **Soft panels, backgrounds** | Light mint | `#d4f0e6` |
| **Page background** | Soft mint-white | `#f7faf9` |
| **Text** | Charcoal | `#232323` |
| **Muted text / panels** | Soft gray | `#7D8180` |
| **Borders** | Light gray-green | `#e5e8e7` |

Avoid bright red, hot pink, electric blue, neon yellow, or purple unless you want a single accent; prefer mint, teal, charcoal, and white for consistency with the rest of Wellnest.

---

## Should I upload a photo of Dr. Reddy?

**Yes.** Upload **Dr-Reddy-qr-code.png** (from `public/wellnest/`) as a **reference image** or **brand photo** when Canva asks. That way:

- The AI uses **his real face** instead of a random person.
- All 16 thumbnails stay **consistent** (same doctor).
- You avoid generic “doctor” or “presenter” stock looks.

If the tool has an option like “Use this photo” or “Include this person,” attach the Dr. Reddy image and refer to it in the prompt (e.g. “Use the uploaded photo of the doctor for the person in the thumbnail”).

---

## Prompts (copy-paste one per thumbnail)

**1 – What are peptides?**  
YouTube thumbnail, 1280x720. Professional smiling doctor (use uploaded photo of Dr Reddy) on the right with a soft white glow along his left edge. Left side solid charcoal (#232323). White bold text: “WHAT ARE” on top, then a mint/sage green (#63D4AC) horizontal banner with white text “PEPTIDES?”. Clean, high-contrast, on-brand wellness look.

**2 – Peptides changing medicine**  
YouTube thumbnail, 1280x720. Professional doctor (use uploaded photo of Dr Reddy) on the right with soft white glow. Left side soft mint-white or light mint (#f7faf9 or #d4f0e6). Two stacked rounded rectangles: top charcoal (#232323) with white text “PEPTIDES”, bottom mint green (#63D4AC) with white text “CHANGING MEDICINE”. A thick mint or teal arrow pointing from text toward the doctor. Bold but aligned with Wellnest mint/teal palette.

**3 – Why everyone talking peptides**  
YouTube thumbnail, 1280x720. Professional doctor (use uploaded photo of Dr Reddy) on the left with soft white glow. Right side darker teal (#4ab896). Two lines of bold white text: “WHY” large on top, “is everyone talking peptides?” smaller below. Thin light mint or light gray border (#e5e8e7) around the whole image. Calm, wellness vibe.

**4 – FDA approved**  
YouTube thumbnail, 1280x720. Professional doctor (use uploaded photo of Dr Reddy) on the right with soft white glow. Left side solid charcoal (#232323). White text “FDA” on top, then a mint green (#63D4AC) horizontal banner with white text “APPROVED??”. Clean medical/educational style, Wellnest colors.

**5 – 3 myths busted**  
YouTube thumbnail, 1280x720. Professional doctor (use uploaded photo of Dr Reddy) on the left with soft white glow. Right side charcoal (#232323). Two stacked banners: top charcoal with white “3 MYTHS”, bottom mint green (#63D4AC) with white “BUSTED”. Mint or teal arrow pointing from text toward the doctor. Punchy but on-brand.

**6 – Where is research going**  
YouTube thumbnail, 1280x720. Professional doctor (use uploaded photo of Dr Reddy) on the right with soft white glow. Left side darker teal (#4ab896). Bold white text: “WHERE IS” on top, “RESEARCH GOING?” below. Thin light mint/gray border (#e5e8e7) around the frame. Clean and professional, Wellnest palette.

**7 – Right for you**  
YouTube thumbnail, 1280x720. Professional doctor (use uploaded photo of Dr Reddy) on the right with soft white glow. Left side solid charcoal (#232323). White text “RIGHT” on top, then a mint green (#63D4AC) horizontal banner with white text “FOR YOU?”. Engaging, wellness question-style.

**8 – Metabolism and growth hormone**  
YouTube thumbnail, 1280x720. Professional doctor (use uploaded photo of Dr Reddy) on the left with soft white glow. Right side light mint (#d4f0e6) or soft mint-white (#f7faf9). Bold text: “METABOLISM” in charcoal (#232323) on top, “& GROWTH HORMONE” in soft gray (#7D8180) below. Thin mint/gray border. Calm, health-focused, on-brand.

**9 – Skincare peptides which to use**  
YouTube thumbnail, 1280x720. Professional doctor (use uploaded photo of Dr Reddy) on the right with soft white glow. Left side solid charcoal (#232323). White text “SKINCARE” on top, mint green (#63D4AC) banner with white “PEPTIDES”, then “WHICH TO USE?” below. At the bottom left, three small simple vial shapes: first with a soft gray X, middle neutral, third with a mint green checkmark. Skincare comparison, Wellnest colors.

**10 – Recovery stack explained**  
YouTube thumbnail, 1280x720. Professional doctor (use uploaded photo of Dr Reddy) on the right with soft white glow. Left side light mint (#d4f0e6). Two stacked banners: top charcoal (#232323) with white “RECOVERY”, bottom mint green (#63D4AC) with white text “STACK EXPLAINED”. Mint or teal arrow pointing from text toward the doctor. Bold and clear, on-brand.

**11 – Skin regeneration**  
YouTube thumbnail, 1280x720. Professional doctor (use uploaded photo of Dr Reddy) on the right with soft white glow. Left side solid charcoal (#232323). White text “SKIN” on top, mint green (#63D4AC) horizontal banner with white text “REGENERATION?”. Dermatology / skincare, Wellnest mint palette.

**12 – Peptides for metabolism**  
YouTube thumbnail, 1280x720. Professional doctor (use uploaded photo of Dr Reddy) on the left with soft white glow. Right side darker teal (#4ab896). Bold white text: “PEPTIDES FOR” on top, “METABOLISM” below. Thin light mint/gray border. Clean and professional, Wellnest colors.

**13 – Dr. Reddy’s peptide guide**  
YouTube thumbnail, 1280x720. Professional doctor (use uploaded photo of Dr Reddy) on the left with soft white glow. Right side darker teal (#4ab896). Two stacked banners: top charcoal (#232323) with white “DR. REDDY’S”, bottom mint green (#63D4AC) with white text “PEPTIDE GUIDE”. Authoritative, guide-style, on-brand.

**14 – Focus and calm**  
YouTube thumbnail, 1280x720. Professional doctor (use uploaded photo of Dr Reddy) on the right with soft white glow. Left side solid charcoal (#232323). White text “FOCUS” on top, mint green (#63D4AC) horizontal banner with white text “& CALM”. Calm, wellness vibe, Wellnest palette.

**15 – Stubborn fat**  
YouTube thumbnail, 1280x720. Professional doctor (use uploaded photo of Dr Reddy) on the right with soft white glow. Left side darker teal (#4ab896). Bold white text: “STUBBORN” on top, “FAT?” below. Thin light mint/gray border. Direct, question-style, on-brand colors.

**16 – The Epitalon story**  
YouTube thumbnail, 1280x720. Professional doctor (use uploaded photo of Dr Reddy) on the right with soft white glow. Left side solid charcoal (#232323). White text “THE” on top, mint green (#63D4AC) horizontal banner with white text “EPITALON”, then “STORY” below. Longevity / story-style, Wellnest mint/teal palette.

---

## Tips

- If the AI doesn’t support a reference photo, keep the phrase “Professional smiling doctor, South Asian man, white shirt, stethoscope, friendly” (or similar) so the look is at least in the right ballpark; you can then replace the face in Canva with the real Dr. Reddy photo.
- After generating, tweak in Canva: replace the face with the uploaded photo, adjust text size, or fix colors. Use the **Wellnest brand colors** table above (mint #63D4AC, teal #4ab896, charcoal #232323) so thumbnails match the rest of the /wellnest UI.
- Export each as **PNG**, **1280×720**, and name the file exactly as in the list (e.g. `video-reddy-1.png`) so the app picks them up.
